# Frost Peaks

## Theme

Frozen mountain pass inhabited by ice goblins and ancient frost creatures.

## Biome Gameplay

Frost Peaks teaches:

- movement under Slow
- avoiding ice zones
- prioritizing support enemies
- fighting aggressive beasts

Unlike Ember Gate, this biome focuses on control instead of burst damage.

Rule:
Almost every enemy can apply Slow.

---

# Ice Goblin

## Role

Basic Melee

## Difficulty

Easy

## Description

Small but aggressive goblin.

Attacks in groups.

## AI

- Rushes the player.
- Tries to surround.
- Never retreats.

## Basic Attack

Ice Dagger

Quick melee attack.

## Ability

Frozen Throw

Throws a small ice shard.

Effects

- low damage
- applies Slow for 2 seconds

Cooldown

6 seconds.

## Required Animations

- Idle
- Walk
- Run
- Attack
- Throw
- Death

## Optional Animations

- Hit

## VFX

- ice shard
- snow particles

## SFX

- goblin laugh
- ice crack
- dagger hit

---

# Frost Wolf

## Role

Fast Predator

## Difficulty

Medium

## Description

Large hunting wolf empowered by frost.

## AI

- Constantly chases player.
- Uses Leap whenever possible.

## Basic Attack

Bite

## Ability

Frozen Leap

Jumps toward the player.

Effects

- medium damage
- applies Slow

Cooldown

7 seconds.

## Required Animations

- Idle
- Walk
- Run
- Bite
- Leap
- Death

## Optional Animations

- Hit

## VFX

- snow trail
- icy landing

## SFX

- growl
- leap
- bite

---

# Frost Shaman

## Role

Support Caster

## Difficulty

Medium

## Description

Goblin shaman channeling ancient frost magic.

Highest target priority.

## AI

Priority

1. Buff allies.
2. Freeze player.
3. Attack if alone.

Keeps maximum distance.

## Basic Attack

Ice Bolt

Medium-range projectile.

## Ability

Frozen Totem

Summons an ice totem.

Effects

- slows nearby players
- increases nearby allies' defense

Duration

8 seconds.

Cooldown

12 seconds.

## Required Animations

- Idle
- Cast
- Death

## Optional Animations

- Hit

## Not Needed

- Walk
- Run

## VFX

- snow swirl
- ice rune
- frozen aura

## SFX

- frost magic
- ice crack
- chanting

---

# Frost Brute

## Role

Biome Boss

## Difficulty

Boss

## Description

Ancient frost giant guarding the mountain pass.

## AI

- Slowly approaches player.
- Controls battlefield with ice.
- Uses heavy melee attacks.

## Basic Attack

Heavy Ice Punch

## Ability 1

Ice Slam

Hits the ground.

Ice spikes travel outward.

## Ability 2

Frozen Stomp

Creates frozen ground.

Effects

- slows movement
- lasts 6 seconds

## Ability 3

Blizzard Roar

Summons a snowstorm.

Visibility slightly reduced.

Applies Slow while inside.

## Phase 2

Triggered at 50% HP.

Changes

- Ice Slam becomes wider.
- Frozen ground lasts longer.

## Phase 3

Triggered at 25% HP.

Enters Frost Rage.

Effects

- attacks faster
- all attacks apply stronger Slow
- leaves icy trails while moving

## Required Animations

- Idle
- Walk
- Heavy Attack
- Ground Slam
- Roar
- Death

## Optional Animations

- Hit

## VFX

- ice spikes
- snowstorm
- frozen ground
- frost aura

## SFX

- heavy footsteps
- ice breaking
- blizzard
- giant roar
